title: corydalis caseana subsp. hastata
intro: Corydalis caseana subsp. hastata is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae, commonly known as a type of corydalis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Corydalis caseana subsp. hastata include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and relaxation of the muscles, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and insomnia. Corydalis caseana subsp. hastata is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tincture form, and can also be dried and used in teas or as a topical application.
